entityTypes.label: Stone
entityTypes.description: Gemstones and minerals used in correspondence systems.

entityTypes.label: Metal
entityTypes.description: Metals and alloys used in correspondence systems.

relationshipTypes.label: Corresponds To
relationshipTypes.description: A direct symbolic or structural correspondence.

relationshipTypes.label: Refines
relationshipTypes.description: A subsection or refinement of a broader correspondence entry.

entities.name: Tree Agate
entities.description: Also known as Dendritic Agate, Mocha Stone.

entities.name: CAT'S EYE
entities.description: Also known as Cymophane, True Cat's Eye.

entities.name: CHALCEDONY
entities.description: Chalcedony is a group of micro-crystalline quartz gemstones that includes Agate, Bloodstone, Carnelian, Chysoprase, Jasper, Onyx, Quartz, and others. See separate individual entries.

entities.name: FELDSPAR
entities.description: Feldspar is a mineral group that includes Labradorite, Sunstone, Amazonite, and Moonstone. See separate individual entries.

entities.name: Red Garnet
entities.description: Also known as Almandite, Pyrope, Bohemian Garnet.

entities.name: LEPIDOLITE
entities.description: Also known as Stone of Peace.

entities.name: LODESTONE
entities.description: Also known as Magnetite, Way Stone.

entities.name: Rutilated Quartz
entities.description: Also known as Venus Hair, Cupid's Darts.

entities.name: Brown Tourmaline
entities.description: Also known as Champagne Tourmaline, Dravite.

entities.name: BORNITE
entities.description: Also known as Peacock Ore, Variegated Copper.

entities.name: MERCURY
entities.description: Also known as Quicksilver. This metal is toxic.

entities.name: ABALONE
entities.description: Haliotis iris, Paua Abalone; H. rufescens, Red Abalone; H. cracherodi, Black Abalone - Also known as Sea Opal (Paua), Sea Ears.

entities.name: ANGEL WING
entities.description: Cyrtopleura costata, Atlantic Angel Wing; Barnea digitata, Pacific Angel Wing

entities.name: CLAM
entities.description: Mercenaria mercenaria, Hard Shell or Quahog Clam; Mya arenaria, Soft Shell Clam; Spisula solidissima, Surf Clam

entities.name: COCKLE
entities.description: Cerastoderma edule, Common European Cockle; Trachycardium muricatum, Yellow Cockle - Also known as Heart Clams.

entities.name: COWRY
entities.description: Cypraea moneta, Money Cowry; C. cinerea, Atlantic Gray Cowry

entities.name: JINGLE
entities.description: Anomia simplex, Common Jingle - Also known as Mermaid's Toenails.

entities.name: MOON SNAIL
entities.description: Polinices duplicates, Atlantic Moon Snail - Also known as Shark's Eye.

entities.name: MOTHER-OF-PEARL
entities.description: This is not a shell; it is the interior nacre of many types of shells such as Abalone.

entities.name: MUREX
entities.description: Murex brandaris, Purple Dye Murex; M. rubidus, Rose Murex - Also known as Rock Shells.

entities.name: MUSSEL
entities.description: Mytilus edulis, Blue Mussel; M. galloprovincialis, Mediterranean Mussel

entities.name: OYSTER
entities.description: Ostrea edulis, European or Edible Oyster

entities.name: SCALLOP
entities.description: Argopecten irradians, Atlantic Bay Scallop; Placopecten magellanicus, Atlantic Deep Sea Scallop

entities.name: SLIPPER SHELL
entities.description: Crepidula fornicata, Common Atlantic Slipper Shell - Also known as Fairy Boat, Fairy Shoes, Quarterdeck Shell.

entities.name: TRITON
entities.description: Charonia tritonis, Triton's Trumpet - Also known as Trumpet Snail.

entities.name: WHELK
entities.description: Busycon contrarium, Lightning Whelk; B. canaliculatum, Channeled Whelk
